106 K5A K5A_PARENTERAL_IV 29a(K5a)Parenteral IV CHAR 1 Indicates the patient is given intravenous (IV) fluids or hyperalimentation continuously or intermittently. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
107 K5B K5B_FEED_TUBE 29b(K5b)Feeding Tube CHAR 1 Indicates the presence of any type of tube that can deliver food/nutritional substances/fluids/medicates directly into the gastrointestinal
